recommendations.title: Sunday's Illness
recommendations.overview: Annabel is a successful businesswoman with a wealthy husband. At a reception in her villa she meets a woman, a member of the catering staff who has been hired for the evening. This woman is none other than her own daughter Chiara, whom she had left o

recommendations.title: Night of the Eagle
recommendations.overview: A woman who may be a witch defends her husband from forces attempting to harm him.

recommendations.title: Junior
recommendations.overview: Alex is in love with Sandra since childhood but has never dared approach her.He asks Antoine, a lonely writer to help him seduce her, because in his time he was the only one to conquer the heart of the mother.

recommendations.title: A Bag of Marbles
recommendations.overview: At the beginning of the 1940s, in a France occupied by Nazi forces, lived the Jewish Joffo family. Happy and tight-knit, she sees her future darken when all members of the family are forced to wear the yellow star. Fearing the worst, the parents orga

recommendations.title: MILF
recommendations.overview: Three childhood friends - Elise, Sonia and Cecile - leave for a summer in the South of France to help clear Cecile’s holiday house before it is put up for sale. There, they soon become the prime targets of three horny young men, for whom these single

recommendations.title: Groundhog Day
recommendations.overview: A cynical TV weatherman, along with his idealistic producer and his sardonic cameraman, is sent to report on Groundhog Day in the small town of Punxsutawney, where he finds himself repeating the same day over and over.

recommendations.title: K.O.
recommendations.overview: A former fighter must find the missing son of an opponent he accidentally killed years ago, taking on a brutally violent crime gang in Marseille.

recommendations.title: Roma
recommendations.overview: In 1970s Mexico City, two domestic workers help a mother of four while her husband is away for an extended period of time.

recommendations.title: Perdida
recommendations.overview: A policewoman whose childhood friend disappeared in Patagonia years ago starts a new search to find answers, and soon finds her own life in danger.

recommendations.title: The Return
recommendations.overview: After twenty years away, Odysseus washes up on the shores of Ithaca, haggard and unrecognizable. The king has finally returned home, but much has changed in his kingdom since he left to fight in the Trojan war.
